message:
feat(stdlib): Expand test module stubs to full implementations

Convert 250+ stub files (4-5 lines each) into complete Zig implementations
with data structures, methods, and comprehensive tests.

Expanded directories:
- test_multiprocessing_* (30 files): Process, Queue, Pool, Manager, Connection
- test_ttk (11 files): geometry, widgets, events, menu, fonts, canvas, images
- test_zoneinfo (10 files): ZoneInfo, transitions, DST, leap seconds, TAI
- test_capi (10 files): C API structures, PyModuleDef, memory management
- test_concurrent_futures (10 files): Future, Executor, ThreadPool, ProcessPool
- test_import, test_module, test_warnings, test_doctest (40 files)
- test_future_stmt, test_free_threading, test_peg_generator (30 files)
- test_tkinter, test_zipfile, test_tools, test_pydoc (40+ files)

Each module now includes:
- Complete struct definitions with proper init/deinit
- Method implementations matching CPython semantics
- Comprehensive Zig test cases
